程序包 edu.bupt.ta.service

类 CvFileService

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.service.CvFileService
public class CvFileService extends Object
Handles physical file operations for TA CV PDFs. Provides upload validation, storage to the data/cvs/ directory, and deletion. Does not update CSV records; callers must update User CSV metadata separately.

  • 嵌套类概要

    说明
    static class 
    CvFileService.SavedCvFile
    Holds metadata about a successfully saved CV file.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • CvFileService

      public CvFileService()

  • 方法详细资料

    • savePdf

      public CvFileService.SavedCvFile savePdf(String userId, jakarta.servlet.http.Part filePart) throws IOException
      Saves an uploaded PDF file to the data/cvs/ directory. The file is stored as "{userId}.pdf" (e.g., "U001.pdf"), regardless of the original filename. Validates size (≤5 MB), file extension (.pdf), and Content-Type.
      参数:
      userId - the user ID, used as the stored filename
      filePart - the uploaded file part from the HTTP request
      返回:
      a CvFileService.SavedCvFile containing metadata about the saved file
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - if validation fails (size, extension, or Content-Type)
      IOException - if the file cannot be written to disk

    • deleteCv

      public boolean deleteCv(String storedName) throws IOException
      Deletes the CV file from disk. No-op if storedName is null or blank.
      参数:
      storedName - the filename on disk (e.g. "U001.pdf")
      返回:
      true if the file was deleted, false if it did not exist
      抛出:
      IOException - if the deletion fails

    • resolveExistingCvPath

      public Path resolveExistingCvPath(String storedName)
      参数:
      storedName - the stored filename (e.g. "U001.pdf")
      返回:
      the absolute path to the file, or null if not found or storedName is blank

    • formatFileSize

      public String formatFileSize(long sizeBytes)
      参数:
      sizeBytes - the file size in bytes
      返回:
      a human-readable size string (e.g. "1.5 MB")

    • getMaxCvSizeBytes

      public long getMaxCvSizeBytes()
      返回:
      the maximum allowed CV file size in bytes (5 MB)
